HackSys AIIncident Assistant
Backend Offline
AI-Powered Observability Platform

Self-Healing Incident Assistant

Automatically detects incidents, generates root cause analysis using Claude AI, retrieves similar historical incidents, and triggers remediation workflows.

System Status

Node.js BackendCHECKING

Express API + Socket.io

Claude AI (RCA)CHECKING

Root Cause Analysis engine

SQLite DatabaseCHECKING

Incidents + logs storage

Log PollerCHECKING

Spring Boot backend polling

RAG MemoryCHECKING

Similar incident retrieval

Spring Boot SourceCHECKING

hackathonps.onrender.com

Platform Capabilities

Real-time Log Ingestion
Polls Spring Boot backend every 20s, deduplicates and groups by trace_id
Incident Detection
Rule-based engine detects 6 incident types and assigns severity
Claude AI RCA
Deep root cause analysis with confidence scoring and remediation steps
RAG Memory
Retrieves similar historical incidents to enrich RCA context
Self-Healing Actions
Triggers Slack alerts, GitHub issues, and restart simulations
Timeline View
Visual trace-correlated event timeline per incident
Auto Suppression
Deduplicates alerts and groups related errors by trace
Live Dashboard
WebSocket-powered real-time updates with zero page refresh
Start the backend first
# Terminal 1 — Backend
cd incident-backend
npm install
cp .env.example .env # add your API key
npm run dev
# Terminal 2 — Dashboard
cd incident-dashboard
npm install
npm run dev

Powered by Claude AI · Next.js · Express · Socket.io · SQLite · ChromaDB
